CASE STUDIES /* A5 simplified */

Client results that survived the regulator.

Every engagement below was produced under active regulatory supervision. The numbers are GA4-verified or independently auditable. The compliance record is zero incidents across all three.

Client case studies

  • HOSPITALITY · NSE-LISTED

    A Major Hotel Group

    840%
    Organic user growth SIX-MONTH CAMPAIGN · GA4 VERIFIED

    NSE-listed hotel group. Direct booking revenue increased 83%. OTA dependency eliminated within a single campaign cycle. Organic user growth of 840% verified in GA4.

    • ASA CAP Code
    • UK Advertising Standards
    Read case study →

  • REAL ESTATE · DUBAI HOLDING

    Meraas

    Zero
    Compliance incidents RERA + TRAKHEESI + DUBAI HOLDING STANDARD

    Digital presence and content architecture built to Dubai Holding standard. Full compliance with RERA, Trakheesi, and a direct Sheikh Mohammed directive. Zero compliance incidents.

    • RERA UAE
    • Trakheesi
    • Dubai Holding Standard
    Read case study →

  • HEALTHCARE · NASDAQ: CGON

    CG Oncology

    +96%
    Share price at IPO SEC REG FD + FDA + FINRA REVIEWED

    Digital content for Nasdaq IPO executed under SEC Regulation FD, FDA disclosure requirements, and FINRA advertising standards simultaneously. Shares up 96% at IPO. Zero compliance incidents.

    • SEC Regulation FD
    • FDA
    • FINRA Rule 2210
    Read case study →

Your sector. Your regulator. Your audit.

Every engagement starts with a compliance and SEO audit. We identify the regulatory gap and build the visibility strategy to close it.
